author: makortel
body:
#### PR description:

This PR extends the data type regexes in `duplicateReflexLibrarySearch.py` to account for the possible `io_vN` namespace that we have been adding for some data types in the EVOLUTION_X branch (to be eventually deployed in `master` in CMSSW_20_X). The PR is for `master` branch though because it should technically work there as well.

Resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2160

#### PR validation:

Running `duplicateReflexLibrarySearch.py --lostDefs` locally in an EVOLUTION_X IB does not report anything.
title: Account for possible `io_vN` namespace in dictionary package checks.
